# Linkbreakers CLI

The `linkbreakers` binary is the official CLI for the Linkbreakers API.

Install:
- `curl -fsSL https://cli.linkbreakers.com/install.sh | bash`

Preferred usage:
- `linkbreakers links list`
- `linkbreakers links get <id>`
- `linkbreakers links create --destination https://example.com`
- `linkbreakers directories list`
- `linkbreakers custom-domains list`

Authentication:
- `LINKBREAKERS_TOKEN`
- `linkbreakers auth set-token --token <token>`

Fallback:
- `linkbreakers raw METHOD PATH`

Update:
- `linkbreakers self-update`

Primary human-readable docs:
- `README.md`
- `docs/commands/linkbreakers.md`
